ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bus_stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus stop */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the bus stop */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the bus stop */,
  "stop_type" TEXT /* Type of bus stop */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the bus stop is currently in use */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bus stop was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bus stop was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus route */,
  "block" INTEGER /* Block number of the route */,
  "badge" INTEGER /* Badge number of the route */,
  "transit_date" TEXT /* Date of the transit */,
  "scheduled_run_time" TEXT /* Scheduled run time of the route */,
  "actual_run_time" TEXT /* Actual run time of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of bus route */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the bus route */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the bus route is currently in operation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bus route was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bus route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_stops" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus route */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop */,
  "stop_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the stop in the route */,
  "actual_arrival" TEXT /* Actual arrival time at the stop */,
  "actual_departure" TEXT /* Actual departure time from the stop */,
  "dwell_time" INTEGER /* Dwell time at the stop */,
  "delay" INTEGER /* Delay in minutes at the stop */,
  "miles_from_prior" REAL /* Miles from the prior stop */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions at the stop */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route stop was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route stop was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id", "stop_id")
)
